notes: Multiplex log handler for observability — internal infra, not user-facing

feature: PostHog error tracking and web vitals
notes: Internal analytics instrumentation
Marketing site moved to Cloudflare Pages with static export and Turnstile captcha
Full Astro 6 migration — blog, SEO, Content Collections, React islands
Structured data, responsive images, OG image generation for blog posts
Homepage leads with pilot messaging. Added logbook, currency, and pilots pages.
Nav adapts to hero image darkness — design detail, not a product feature
Resend-hosted email templates (auth, transactional, marketing). Svix webhook verification.
XP-based training progress tracking. Goals, milestones, achievements. ACS-mapped progress.

feature: Training goal selection and change flow
notes: Pilots choose a training goal (PPL, IR, CPL) during onboarding. Goal change confirmation flow.
Visual XP progress bar with milestone markers replaces CertificationTimeline on all dashboards.
SwiftUI TrainingXPBar and ObjectiveCard wired into Pilot dashboard.
Shows current objective with actionable next step. Wired into all four dashboard variants.
Objective tracking card on Pilot iOS dashboard.
Server detects goal completion, awards certificate achievements, triggers celebration UIs.
Celebration modal when pilot completes a training goal.
iOS equivalent of goal completion celebration.
Passwordless login via passkeys. Conditional UI (autofill), manage passkeys in settings, enrollment prompt post-login.

feature: Passkey registration and management on iOS
notes: Passkey enrollment prompt with backoff, management UI in profile settings.
SwiftData-backed local cache. Logbook entries and contacts cached locally. Cache-first reads, immediate sync on app resume.
Contacts cached locally for offline logbook crew picker. Supporting feature.
Offline logbook entry creation and editing. Outbox pattern with batch upload. Create entries offline, they sync when connectivity returns.
Server endpoint for batch upsert — supports offline mutation queue. Up to 50 entries per request.

feature: AbeamSync Phase 3 — delta sync and background sync
notes: Delta sync (only download changes since last sync, not full logbook). Background sync via BGTaskScheduler. Per-user SwiftData store isolation.

feature: Sync status UI and offline banner
notes: Per-row sync status indicators (pending upload icon) in logbook list. Offline banner when disconnected. Manual 'Sync Now' button in settings.
Read-only aircraft cache for offline logbook aircraft picker. Stale removal and orphaned mutation recovery.
SHA-256 entry hash for CFI signature integrity verification. Compliant with AC 120-78B electronic signature guidance. Server and iOS both compute and verify.
iOS data protection — files encrypted at rest unless actively open. Security hardening.
